arts.ttl: VOTE: Maresca says Chelsea have had a good season - do you agree?
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca says they have had a good season that will become "very good" should they qualify for the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea defender Gusto looks set for spell out
arts.sum: Malo Gusto looks set for a spell on the sidelines after suffering an injury during Chelsea’s derby win at Fulham. Gusto, on as a substitute for the Blues, had to be taken off late in the game after picking up what looked like a nasty hamstring injury. “That unfortunately is not a good one. arts.ttl: Maresca stands by James, explains Nkunku omission and gives Gusto injury update after Chelsea victory
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca insisted he took Reece James off at half-time against Fulham because the Chelsea captain had already played 90 minutes this week. Pedro Neto’s stoppage-time winner at Craven Cottage gave Maresca’s side a dramatic 2-1 victory and a huge boost in their pursuit of a Champions League place. arts.ttl: Chelsea given clear Lampard message at Fulham as Maresca sack pressure grows
arts.sum: Chelsea supporters made their feelings clear on Enzo Maresca during Sunday's 2-1 win at Fulham . Maresca's style of play has been at odds with what Blues fans are used to seeing.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's final fixtures compared to Premier League rivals in new Champions League race twist
arts.sum: If Nottingham Forest and Chelsea are both still in the race for Champions League qualification come the final day of the season then this will be huge. Newcastle United (A) – Premier League – Sunday, May 11

arts.ttl: Silva rues ‘missed opportunity’ after Fulham’s derby defeat
arts.sum: Marco Silva admitted it was a “missed opportunity” after his Fulham side suffered a dramatic 2-1 west London derby defeat against Chelsea. The Whites went ahead in the 20th minute at Craven Cottage through Alex Iwobi. But they faded in the second half and Chelsea substitute Tyrique George equalised before a stunning strike from Pedro […] The post Silva rues ‘missed opportunity’ after Fulham’s derby defeat appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Fulham 1-2 Chelsea: Enzo Maresca plays down importance of dramatic Pedro Neto winner in West London derby
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca plays down suggestions that Pedro Neto's stunning late winner against Fulham puts a positive spin on the club's season.

arts.ttl: ‘I have no words’ – Pedro Neto rocket boosts Chelsea top five hopes
arts.sum: Pedro Neto blasted the ball into the Fulham net in stoppage time to give Chelsea a valuable win in the Premier League top five race on Sunday. arts.ttl: Chelsea fans all make the same point about Tyrique George after brilliant performance in win over Fulham, 'saves the season'
Pedro Neto says Fulham player did something 'unbelievable' during 2-1 Chelsea win
arts.sum: Chelsea secured a dramatic west London derby win over Fulham at Craven Cottage thanks to Pedro Neto. The Portugal international turned and struck a ferocious...
